title: Flavorful Dense Moroccan Lentil Harira
description: A salty, dense, and comforting Moroccan dish featuring a bouquet garni and yuzu cure, perfect for a diabetic friendly meal.

ingredients.name: bouquet garni
ingredients.notes: containing thyme, parsley, and bay leaves

instructions: In a large pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, carrots, and celery and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth, red lentils, bouquet garni, yuzu cure, salt, and black pepper, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Remove the bouquet garni and season the harira with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the harira hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
Let the harira cool completely, then refrigerate or freeze for later use.
